step.title: Load context and story artifact
step.action: If a story artifact exists (from the storytelling workflow), load it for narrative threading. Load market-data and traction-data if available.

step.title: Define the pitch narrative
step.action: Structure the pitch arc: problem (pain), solution (relief), market (opportunity), traction (proof), team (credibility), ask (next step). The story artifact informs the emotional thread if present.

step.title: Design problem and solution slides
step.action: The problem slide must make the audience feel the pain. The solution slide must deliver relief. One idea per slide.

step.title: Design market and traction slides
step.action: Market slide: TAM/SAM/SOM or equivalent sizing. Traction slide: metrics, milestones, proof points. Data visualization principles apply.

step.title: Design team and ask slides
step.action: Team slide: why this team wins. Ask slide: specific, concrete request with clear next step.

step.title: Review and finalize
step.action: Review every slide for job assignment. Cut anything that does not advance the pitch. Move supporting detail to appendix.

step.title: Produce the pitch deck artifact
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md. Fill all sections with pitch deck specifications.
